prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for Aniline were computed using Density Functional Theory (DFT) with the tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP functional/basis set, with density fitting enabled by default in PySCF) in the gas phase. The molecule was treated with a charge of 0 and a multiplicity of 1. The geometry was sourced from the provided `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz` file. The calculation converged successfully.

The computed Fukui indices for each atom are as follows:

The most electrophilic site is Carbon atom 3 (f+ = 2.29759), and the most nucleophilic site is Nitrogen atom 1 (f- = 0.20452).

The full CLI invocation was: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --multiplicity 1 /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpwqb2nufg/live.json`
